The results of the injuries in several digits, from the first to
the. thirtieth, arc to be declared in the following order :
(I) Son^s death, (2) acquisition of wealth, (3) loss of money,
(4) prosperity, (5) imprisonment, (6) birth of a son, (7) quarrel,
(8) winning of elephants, (9) death of a son, (10) influx of wealth,
(II) death, (12) getting of wife, fl3) mental affliction, (14) gain,
(15) loss, (16) winning a damsel, (17) murder, (18) progress, (19)
death, (20) rejoicing, (21) loss of wealth, (22) acquisition of wealth,
(23; lacking happiness, (24) influx of wealth, (25) death, (26)
